programme.desc: It tells the story of a beautiful girl named Ana. It is said that Ana is a meatball seller who uses a cart and hangs out in front of her grandfather Rendy's house. So gradually grandfather Rendy really likes Ana. Strangely, Rendy is annoyed because his grandfather is always looking for Ana. Even Rendy is curious, to the point of coming to Ana's cart and watching Ana mix meatballs for her customers. "Do you use pellets in the meatballs?" said Rendy in a hoarse voice.

programme.title: Den Bagus, Pinjam Cintanya Dong Seratus
programme.desc: It tells the story of a handsome young man named Bagus. It is said that Bagus was late in delivering flowers to Irene and her beautiful friends. But strangely, Bagus was not angry. This is because all the girls liked Bagus. Meanwhile, Bagus said to Irene, "The flower you like most is a rose. But don't touch it wrong, because if you do, your hand will be hurt!" Then when Irene wanted to borrow Bagus's love a hundred times, Bagus welcomed her with a big smile.

programme.title: Geprek Aja Terus Cintaku Sampe Ke Penghulu

programme.desc: Caught in a tense love triangle, Andre and Dion go head-to-head to win the heart of the beautiful Astuti. While the confident Dion openly expresses his deep affection for her, Andre's massive pride gets in the way, making him too stubborn to confess his true feelings.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 221
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Sepupu Metal Bikin Cinta Brutal
programme.desc: Farel (Masaji Wijayanto), a gentle and soft-spoken guy, is pressured by his grandmother to track down a long-lost cousin. Looking for a quick fix, Farel decides to give Dini (Shanice Margaretha)—a rebellious, heavy-metal-loving girl who shares a striking resemblance—a massive makeover to pass her off as the missing cousin, Dinda. However, as he transforms the edgy Dini into a proper lady, Farel accidentally falls head over heels for her.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 23
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 170
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Cinta Terhalang Palang Pintu Gue Beri
programme.desc: Suryani (Andi Viola) is a proud member of a traditional Betawi cultural arts troupe. Her best friend always encourages her to find a strong, protective man who can keep her safe. Hope arrives when a charming new member named Richard (Fendy Chow) joins the studio, instantly stealing Suryani's heart. However, just as Suryani prepares to confess her love, she discovers a heartbreaking truth: her best friend is also secretly in love with Richard

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 222
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ngarep Ditaksir Eh Malah Di Unfol
programme.desc: Fresh off a painful breakup, Rama (El Ryan) and Sita (Andi Viola) accidentally collide in the street. Sita, who was carrying a batch of carefully baked cupcakes meant to win back her ex, watches in horror as her hard work splatters across the pavement. A guilt-ridden Rama offers to compensate her tenfold, but Sita takes it as an insult. For her, it was never about the money—those cupcakes were her final, desperate hope to salvage her relationship.

programme.title: Konser Luar Biasa 2gether 4ever
programme.desc: Dangdut legends like Nita Thalia, Rita Sugiarto, Jihan Audy, and Tasya Rosmala come together for the '2 Gether 4Ever' concert. This star-studded event celebrates Indosiar's 24th Anniversary, delivering spectacular performances for fans both in the studio and at home.

programme.title: JODOH TERHALANG TIANG JEMURAN
programme.desc: Caught in a tense love triangle, Andre and Dion go head-to-head to win the heart of the beautiful Astuti. While the confident Dion openly expresses his deep affection for her, Andre's massive pride gets in the way, making him too stubborn to confess his true feelings.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 222
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Sepupu Metal Bikin Cinta Brutal
programme.desc: Farel (Masaji Wijayanto), a gentle and soft-spoken guy, is pressured by his grandmother to track down a long-lost cousin. Looking for a quick fix, Farel decides to give Dini (Shanice Margaretha)—a rebellious, heavy-metal-loving girl who shares a striking resemblance—a massive makeover to pass her off as the missing cousin, Dinda. However, as he transforms the edgy Dini into a proper lady, Farel accidentally falls head over heels for her.

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 645
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: BADUT KOK NANGIS, KATANYA KUAT
programme.desc: Ayu's life takes a tragic turn when her happy world shatters following the untimely death of her beloved father. Left alone to fend for herself, she is thrust into a harsh reality, facing endless misery and struggles to survive.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 171
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mohon Doa Restu Yura, Semesta Mendukung
programme.desc: Syifa (Rayna Snova) is fiercely determined to get into her dream university, but her friends relentlessly mock her, claiming she lacks the brains. In the middle of the humiliation, a handsome guy named Bowo (Aditya Zoni) steps in to defend her. Bowo offers to tutor Syifa until she passes the entrance exams, but it comes with a catch: once accepted, Syifa must agree to be his fake girlfriend for three months.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 223
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ditiup Kamu Bikin Cenat Cenut
programme.desc: Bastian (Cakrawala Airawan) is a pampered, sheltered rich boy whose world turns upside down when his family's business suddenly goes bankrupt. Desperate for a job, he accidentally bumps into Maesaroh (Shanice Margaretha), a proud Betawi girl carrying food containers. After a clumsy rescue leads to an accidental embrace, Maesaroh invites the jobless Bastian to join her traditional Tanjidor musical troupe—a legacy left by her late father. As they grow closer, they remain blissfully unaware of anot

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 25
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Bowo offers to tutor Syifa until she passes the entrance exams, but it comes with a catch: once accepted, Syifa must agree to be his fake girlfriend for three months.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 48
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Awak Suka Saya Tak? - EP 16
programme.desc: Intan mencintai Hilman Yong, Sejak kemalangan berlaku Hilman hilang menjadi Damien Yong. Kini Intan terpaksa menyayangi bekas suaminya dari jauh dan menunggu Hilman kembali kepadanya.

programme.title: Expose Mistik: Kisah Seram - EP 15
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan seram untuk tontonan.

programme.title: Kennot Brain - EP 26
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Isteri VS. Tunang - EP 7
programme.desc: Alana Sofea, seorang gadis yang berterus terang, mencabar ego Zaim Azfar, seorang lelaki yang sombong dan angkuh, lalu membawa mereka ke dalam perkahwinan yang tidak dijangka.

programme.title: Keluarga Iskandar - EP 5
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang seorang ibu tunggal, Mak Jah dan kisah kehidupannya bersama lapan orang anaknya yang sudah dewasa.

programme.title: Cik Reen Encik Ngok Ngek - EP 18
programme.desc: Azreen dan Harris terpaksa berkahwin apabila adik mereka melarikan diri pada malam sebelum bernikah. Adakah perkahwinan Harris dan Azreen akan berkekalan selepas Roadtrip Misadventures mereka?

programme.title: Biniku Ninja - EP 19
programme.desc: Azlan berasal dari keluarga susah yang akhirnya berjaya merantau ke UK setelah mendapat tawaran menyambung ijazah dalam aliran seni. Kisah bermula apabila beliau berjumpa dengan seorang gadis

programme.title: Sembang Teh Tarik S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sembang Teh Tarik yang dikendalikan Datuk AC Mizal ia merupakan program 'talk show' yang terbaru dan santai sesuai untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Elak Elak - EP 5
programme.desc: Komedi yang dipentaskan oleh gabungan pelawak tanahair menampilkan pelbagai isu berkaitan kesilapan yang sering berlaku dalam kehidupan seharian kita.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Bersama barisan atlit handal dan selebriti popular tanah air, sakasikan mereka berentap dalam acara sukan dan permainan menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 1
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 5
programme.desc: Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pakya akan bersembang di Warung sepahtu bersama tetamu undangan mereka.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 8
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Berita Hangit - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Pesta Muda Mudi - EP 3
programme.desc: Memberi penghargaan kepada lagu-lagu pop Malaysia sepanjang zaman dari tahun 1930 hingga ke tahun 2010 untuk dipersembahkan oleh artis tempatan dalam bentuk akustik.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 7
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Makan - EP 16
programme.desc: Meneroka masakan yang lain dari yang lain, memberikan tips mudah ketika di dapur dan membawa anda ke restoran-restoran yang terkemuka di sekitar Kuala Lumpur

programme.desc: Saksikan gelagat Kak Lina Pom Pom yang kecoh dan lucu bersama para tetamu jemputan melakukan cabaran istimewa yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Fan Fanatik - EP 12

programme.desc: Mengisahkan perjuangan empat sekawan - Amir, Farah, Hakim dan Liz - untuk membuktikan bahawa pasukan mereka mampu mengatasi segala cabaran untuk mewakili Kadet bomba di Kem Jamboree Kebangsaan.

programme.title: Gerak Geri Gen Z - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah eksplorasi 4 sahabat remaja perempuan Cik B, Ara, Alyssa dan Qadejah di Turki. Mereka menelusuri kota bersejarah dan budaya.

programme.title: The Chosen One 2024 - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan kehebatan bakat-bakat muda yang akan mempersembahkan nyanyian terbaik mereka di bawah bimbingan barisan penyanyi terkemuka tanahair sebagai coach!

programme.title: Hikayat Bawang Putih Bawang Merah - EP 2
programme.desc: Bawang Putih tinggal bersama ibu tiri dan adik tiri dan setiap hari didera. Putih melarikan diri dan bertembung dengan Putera rupawan di dalam hutan Inderaloka.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 3

programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: Jutawan Ekspres - EP 2
programme.desc: Keluarga miskin berpindah ke kejiranan kaya selepas menjadi jutawan serta merta. Masing-masing cuba untuk hidup sebagai 'orang kaya' mengikut cara mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Cinta Luar Biasa
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang sahabat lama yang kembali bertemu dalam satu 'reunion' selepas sepuluh tahun tamat belajar di universiti namun kali ini rasa cinta dan cemburu mula mendominasi.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Prankap Show - EP 4
programme.desc: Saksikan selebriti popular merancang "prank" bersama geng mereka dan mengenakan mangsa terpilih. Berjayakan perancangan "prank" mereka? Sama-sama kita nantikan!

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 19
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: The Maid - EP 9
programme.desc: Kehidupan Jay dan empat orang isterinya nampak bahagia namun hakikatnya isteri - isterinya saling membenci. Konflik terjadi apabila isteri ke-4 dibunuh. Siapakah pembunuhnya?

programme.title: Cik Misi 123 - EP 25
programme.desc: Sis Jen menegur Remy yang masih ingin mengganggu Dr Erin, sedangkan Dr Eri itu masih tunangan orang. Ica rasa tidak selesa dengan kelakuan Pian. Baby mula fikirkan tentang novelnya sahaja.

programme.title: Split TV Series - EP 10
programme.desc: Maryam akan berkahwin dengan Mikael . Maryam tidak mengetahui Mikael menghidap Dissociative Identity Disorder, satu jasad tujuh personality berbeza di dalamnya.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Konti Karat - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara yang berformat baru dan di hos kan oleh Shuib Sepahtu bersama-sama tetamu undangannya.

programme.title: DramaVaganza: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 15
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Gen F - EP 5
programme.desc: 12 pereka fesyen terpilih dari Malaysia, Indonesia dan Singapura akan bersaing setiap minggu untuk menghasilkan rekaan terbaik mereka.

programme.title: Kampung Boy S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Nikmati animasi terbaik hasil nukilan Dato' Lat yang penuh kreatif lagi menghiburkan ini istimewa untuk tontonan anda sekeluarga!

programme.title: Hard to Heart S3 - EP 6
programme.desc: Program temubual bersama artis tersohor, mengenai jatuh bangun mereka dalam sepanjang terbabit dengan kerjaya seni tempatan.

programme.title: Maskulin: Who's Your Bro - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancangan realiti kecergasan penuh adrenalin yang mendefinisikan persaudaraan lelaki! 12 peserta dari pelbagai latar belakang akan berdepan cabaran fizikal dan emosi serta pemikiran strategik.

programme.title: Dukun Diva - EP 1
programme.desc: Che Yah ditinggalkan dengan amanah untuk menjaga anak saudaranya Lola. Atas desakkan hidup, mereka bersepakat untuk berpura-pura menjadi bomoh.

programme.title: Dukun Diva - EP 2
programme.desc: Dukun Diva mula mengintip Zul dan berjaya membuatkan Zul percaya dia telah di sihir oleh salah seorang kekasihnya. Manakala, Lola menyamar untuk mendekati Daniel.

programme.title: Dukun Diva - EP 3
programme.desc: Che Yah dan Lola telah mambuat beberapa percubaan untuk membuat Saddiq percaya bahawa dia telah di sihir, namun gagal. Lola kemudian mencuri 'saka' dan keadaan menjadi huru-hara.

programme.title: Dukun Diva - EP 4
programme.desc: Che Yah dan Lola menyamar menjadi pekerja baharu di kilang D’Saddiq untuk sabotaj pelancaran produk terbarunya. Sementara itu, Zul dan Anep mendapat tahu bahawa Che Yah adalah bekas GRO.

programme.title: Perang Jantina - EP 4
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jantina mana yang lebih unggul.

programme.title: Next To Neelofa - EP 9
programme.desc: Program bual bicara Neelofa bakal membincangkan secara mendalam beberapa topik merangkumi kesihatan, kesejahteraan, cinta, kecantikan & gaya, perihal wanita, keibubapaan, perhubungan dan kerjaya.

programme.title: Duit Kawin
programme.desc: Memaparkan pemikiran remaja sekarang terhadap perkahwinan dari sudut kos atas syariat agama tetapi tertekan cara hidup zaman kini yang mahukan kemewahan.

programme.title: Ready Set Action S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Travelog artis-artis tempatan membawa peminat bertuahnya untuk meneroka tempat ikonik yang pernah menjadi lokasi latar belakang adegan filem terkenal dalam Ready, Set, Action! musim ke 2.

programme.title: RASA Anak Emak Anak Bapak - EP 3
programme.desc: Program masakan ini memerlukan selebriti jemputan membawa ibu atau bapa mereka menjelajah Malaysia bagi merasa sendiri masakan kegemaran ibu bapa masing-masing.

programme.title: Solo YOLO - EP 11
programme.desc: Program perjalanan realiti mengenai eksplorasi solo ke beberapa negara, untuk mengalami keunikan pemandangan dan aktiviti tempat di tempat yang dilawati.

programme.desc: Devina a newspaper journalist from Lucknow falls in love with Kashi and things go awry when Kashi's sister Ganga goes missing. Release Year: 2018 Director: Dhiraj Kumar

programme.title: Looop Lapeta

programme.title: Param Sundari
programme.desc: Two hearts collide as a North and South Indian unexpectedly fall for each other. Their diverse backgrounds ignite a comedic and tumultuous love story, brimming with cultural misadventures.

programme.title: Ganapath - A Hero Is Born
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, relentless vigilante Ganapath embarks on a mission to dismantle a powerful criminal empire that rules the city in fear. Ganapath becomes a symbol of hope for the oppressed.

programme.title: Secret Superstar
programme.desc: Insia, an ambitious young girl, dreams of becoming a singer but faces opposition from her father. Undeterred, she strives to follow her passion by anonymously posting her songs on the Internet.

programme.title: Atrangi Re
programme.desc: A Tamil boy meets a girl from Bihar, what follows is a love story for the ages. A non-linear narrative of two romances running in parallel from different timelines.

programme.title: Major
programme.desc: The life of Maj. Sandeep Unnikrishnan, who fought against terrorists and was killed in action during the 2008 attacks at the Taj Palace Hotel in Mumbai, India.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: The Making Of Pk
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Nazar Andaaz
programme.desc: A carefree blind man living with his loyal caretaker inadvertently launches a chaotic competition for his wealth when he befriends a small-time thief.

programme.title: The Making Of Mubarakan
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Shaan
programme.desc: DCP Shiv Kumar, an honest police officer, lives with his family and two brothers, who are conmen. During a case, Shiv Kumar gets killed and the two brothers avenge his death.

programme.title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
programme.desc: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

programme.title: Dashing Hero
programme.desc: A revenue inspector falls in love with a girl but faces problems due to his cowardliness. He is compelled to find a way to prove himself to her father, who wants her to marry a brave man.

programme.title: Hum Aapke Dil Mein Rehte Hain
programme.desc: Not knowing what consequences she would face, a woman signs a 1-year marriage contract with a business tycoon to end her family's poverty.

programme.title: Anek
programme.desc: Madhu, an animator, gets thoughts about her past life, but her psychiatrist believes it to be a figment of her imagination. Madhu happens to meet Ashwin, the man she was in love with in her past life.

programme.title: Lagaan
programme.desc: During the British Raj, a farmer named Bhuvan accepts the challenge of Captain Andrew Russell to beat his team in a game of cricket and enable his village to not pay taxes for the next three years.

programme.title: Setters
programme.desc: Apurva Chaudhary and his team leak several examination papers and make huge profits out of it. Meanwhile, Aditya Singh and his team of honest officers attempt to catch the criminals.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: This mystery-thriller series revolves around an alluring woman named Juliana and her illicit affair with Alex, a lawyer who also happens to be the brother of Juliana's husband, Victor, a washed-up boxer. What is the story behind Juliana's betrayal and infidelity?

programme.title: Blood VS. Duty
programme.desc: This action drama series pits government agents against a tight-knit fishing community in a high-stakes battle over illegal firearms.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: A group of disgraced yet highly-skilled operatives hope to seek redemption as they take on dangerous covert missions and fight against the enemy they unwittingly uncovered.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: An undercover agent goes on a dangerous mission to bring down a crime ring. Fuelled by a bitter and painful past, Apollo and his allies face the gruelling task that will challenge his resolve and strength.

programme.title: TV Patrol Weekday Global Edition

programme.title: Manina, La Fille Sans Voiles
programme.desc: Gerard, a young student, discovers a fragment from a Phoenician amphora in Corsica. Several years later he sets off on a smuggling boat, looking for the treasure he thinks he has found. When he get back to island, he falls in love with the young Manina...

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Behind the steering wheel of a car, a young boy holds back his tears and his breath while a female voice speaks to him on the telephone. Based on a true story, the last 48 hours of the life of Marc-Antoine, aged 14, confronted by his urgent need for freedom.

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu - EP 3
programme.desc: At the very top of Rio de Janeiro's largest favela, Raed Hammoud discovers the Mineira favela's football pitch. He travels around Rio in search of what makes football fans tick: the beaches, where Brazilians play night and day, the mythical Maracana...

programme.title: Terrain De Jeu - EP 4
programme.desc: In New York, Raed Hammoud visits the Brooklyn Bridge Park Stadium, a magnificent pitch with a breathtaking panoramic view. It shows that in a city traditionally devoted to basketball and baseball, football holds a special place, both on the pitch and in people's hearts.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 2
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde visits a flea market in Deux-Sevres, then the Molecule workshop in Bordeaux.

programme.desc: Luc lives in an underground house, almost entirely self-sufficient, which he built himself. Show Bis, the association that recovers old theatre sets and costumes to give them a second life. In Montville, school canteens cook with local products, in short supply chains.

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 1
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 2
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 3
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 4
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 5
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 43
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 8
programme.desc: Who can beat Sheep in the 400 metres hurdles, when he sends everyone watching to sleep?

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 5
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 50
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 31
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 41
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go - EP 1
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel - EP 1
programme.desc: Morocco celebrates the return from exile of its king, Mohammed V. Above the crowd, an airplane distributes leaflets. On board: Touria Chaoui, the first Moroccan female pilot in the Arab world.

programme.title: Mission Info
programme.desc: News programme aimed at 7 to 11-year-olds! Each episode, devised for children and their parents, provides insight accessible to younger ones, combined with explanations, immersive reports and expert interviews. An educational quiz also gives children the chance to test their knowledge in a fun way.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo
programme.desc: Report, inquiry, investigation ... ''Objectif Monde L'Hebdo'', a television magazine by French-speaking editorialists, takes time to reflect and analyse through the expert insights and opinions provided by specialists. A TV5MONDE programme, jointly produced with RTS, in collaboration with its francophone partners (RTBF, Radio-Canada, France Televisions).

programme.title: L'echappee Belge - EP 3
programme.desc: Antique dealer Aurore Morisse crosses the Tour de Crest, Mirmande, the Via Rhona and the Via Ardeche. With Adrien, they blow glass in Ruoms and discover the treasures of the region.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera - EP 94
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 9
programme.desc: An engaged content creator, Oceane specializes in textured hair and is the creator of the Curl Talk Show program. Born to a Cameroonian mother and a French father, she uses her curls as a pretext to create a space for education, self-confidence and identity affirmation.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 90
programme.desc: She's a legend of French handball! World champion, Olympic champion, European champion, and also voted best handball player in the world in 2009: Allison Pineau is Pierre Classen's guest.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F - EP 13
programme.desc: How can French gastronomy be reinvented? Richard Orlinski meets talents who break the codes without renouncing their roots. Alice Tuyet, a self-taught Parisian chef, fuses her Franco-Vietnamese heritage and offers innovative vegan cuisine. In her restaurant in the Saint-Honore district, she revisits classics by integrating sauces rich in flavor and surprising textures.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Guides D'aventures - EP 6
programme.desc: Guide and instructor, Sylvie Brassard left Canada to settle in Perth, Australia, where she runs a kitesurfing school. In Exmouth, a small locality much appreciated by fans of sail sports, she welcomes Iftu, a Fransaskois who has come to explore the Ningaloo Marine Park and Cape Range.

programme.title: Peaux Noires : Quel Heritage ? - EP 2
programme.desc: What intimate and social relationship do Black French-speaking people have with their skin color? Through personal testimonies, expert contributions and innovative visual staging, the series explores the historical and cultural evolution of the representation of Black skin.

programme.title: Tendance Xxi
programme.desc: French creativity is booming in the fields of fashion, crafts, design, beauty and gastronomy. 'Tendance XXI' showcases a know-how that evolves in tune with the times, sometimes even anticipating them.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 12
programme.desc: The Maison des Canuts traces the long tradition of Lyon's gold, silver and silk weavers. Each creation by visual artist Sarah Valente sounds like a call from the forest. Zomer is turning fashion upside down. In Brittany, craftsman Thibaut Thierry works paper with seaweed.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 27
programme.desc: On the menu: egg and fine herb nests, spring roll bundles, ricotta, green bean and asparagus sandwich, lemon tarts.

programme.title: Parlons Eco
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Taratata 100% Live - EP 6
programme.desc: For almost 90 minutes, watch the greatest names on the French and international music scene appear one after the other. Unexpected duets and trios, first-time covers, new talents... ''Taratata 100% live'' has all the ingredients that have made it a success, with even more live performances.

programme.title: Ardennes, Toute ame A Ses Petits Secrets
programme.desc: Enigmatic psychiatrist Olivier Rimbaud lives in an isolated manor in Champagne-Ardenne. In addition to taking care of his patients, he does profiling to help the police with the most complex cases. As he sets out on the trail of a serial killer, his own secrets catch up with him.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 7
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Festa Major
programme.desc: In a village in the Pyrenees-Orientales, a ritual that has lasted for a hundred years takes place every year at the end of summer: a large popular celebration spread over five days. The camera films this ode to joy, lightness and sharing like a timeless tableau.

programme.title: La Copie De Coralie
programme.desc: Manager of a reprographics shop, Mr. Conforme is haunted by the memory of a woman. Witnessing the distress of the employer, Virginie, the assistant, posts a search notice on the walls of the city.

programme.title: Ativio - Les Morceaux De Bois
programme.desc: Guenole, aged 12, lives in an isolated Togolese village. Gifted in music, he dreams of playing the piano but doesn't own one.

Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: Terriennes - EP 33
programme.desc: The ''Terriennes'' portal: a site in French on the status of women around the world.

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 3
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 4
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees ready to read them a story.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 5
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: Dessine Les Animaux Avec Koumi - EP 6
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: C'est Mathematique ! Avec Iman - EP 6
programme.desc: Iman, a former maths teacher, offers primary school pupils a survival kit to help them approach secondary school with confidence. In each episode, using a fun and educational approach, he aims to make his subject clear and practical.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 44
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: Les Jeux De La Fontaine - EP 9
programme.desc: Will the referee manage to ensure the competition is fair for everyone in the disabled archery event, when there's a serious shortage of equipment?

programme.title: Belfort Et Lupin - EP 6
programme.desc: Belfort, the king's dog, and Lupin, the wolf of the gardens, live in the Palace of Versailles. As inseparable as they are unlikely, they come to the rescue of all their furry and feathered friends, from the royal menagerie to the local wildlife.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 51
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 32
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 42
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Foot Go - EP 2
programme.desc: Eight year-old Tata arrives in a new school. She wants to join its football team but isn't allowed to; after all she's a girl! Refusing to be beaten, Tata decides to set up her own girls' team with the help of her gang of friends.

programme.title: Marocains Du Ciel - EP 2
programme.desc: Young Touria Chaoui goes to the flight school to take the entrance exam. She receives a very cold welcome, as she is the only woman attempting the experience.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 5
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Territoires De France
programme.desc: Discovering the treasures of the French regions, the initiatives and people who bring them to life.

programme.title: Basik
programme.desc: The programme which explores and explains the economy, examines our relationship to money and analyses our purchasing power. The economic, social and environmental challenges of tomorrow are covered in a direct, down-to-earth and occasionally mischievous manner!

programme.title: A Bon Entendeur
programme.desc: ''ABE'' examines a wide range of topics affecting everyday life in everyday homes: it tests products, compares prices, highlights fraudulent practices, raises consumer awareness and questions manufacturers. The programme addresses economic, social, environmental and health issues and talks about leisure activities, technology...

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: 13h15 Le Dimanche - EP 9
programme.desc: An alternative take on the news, current events and politics, both dynamic and different in its approach.

programme.title: Echappees Belles - EP 27
programme.desc: Few destinations are as dependent on tourism as the Balearic Islands, chosen for their unique blend of nature, culture, history, gastronomy and leisure. Alongside perfect relaxation, the archipelago offers miles of beaches, sparkling coves, mountain lands, typical villages, numerous heritage sites and hidden secrets...

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: La Grande Galerie Francophone - EP 36
programme.desc: Every week and in public, Ali Baddou and his group of columnists receive French-speaking artists who are at the heart of current events and move the lines. Space for exchanges, creations and surprises, ''La Grande Galerie Francophone'' celebrates art in all its diversity and shares it with everyone.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Secrets D'histoire - EP 3
programme.desc: Like his characters, Alexandre Dumas led an extravagant and thrilling life. This prolific French writer strings together romantic conquests, loves opulence, and scoffs at criticism. His travels, reflections of his passions, his struggles, and his triumphs, greatly inspired his major literary works.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 4
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Championnat Du Monde D'endurance Wec 2026 - EP 2
programme.desc: Second leg of the 2026 World Championship in Belgium, at the legendary Spa-Francorchamps circuit. A look back at the best moments.

programme.title: Rugby - Top 14
programme.desc: French Rugby Union Championship match (Top 14).

programme.title: Movie - Kalakalappu 2
programme.desc: Raghu learns about his father's ancestral property, which is taken care by Srinivas. When Ganesh cheats both of them, they visit Karaikudi to get hold of Ganesh and recover their money.

programme.title: Movie - Iravukku Aayiram Kangal
programme.desc: A cab driver finds himself in a tough spot after he is suspected of a murder. Multiple stories unfold while he tries to prove himself innocent.

programme.title: Movie - Oru Nadigayin Vaakkumoolam
programme.desc: A reporter sets off to find an actress who disappeared into obscurity at the peak of her career. She finally finds the actress at a brothel and learns some shocking truths.

programme.title: Movie - Othikai
programme.desc: At various Indian tourist spots, especially hill stations, numerous lovers end their lives for love, but some lovers are being killed. The movie deals with this subject with a mix of thriller, action and romance.

programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.desc: Vishwa, a lazy and good-for-nothing man, does not like his father, who is an honest constable. But after his father gets murdered, he transforms himself into a disciplined police officer to take revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Vennila Kabadi Kuzhu
programme.desc: Having never won a tournament, a team of kabaddi players are ridiculed by their villagers. Their redemption finally arrives while playing in Madurai, for which they pay a heavy price.

programme.title: Movie - Ponmana Chelvan
programme.desc: Raja, the eldest of three brothers, finds out that he is adopted and is shocked to learn the truth. To make matters worse, his brothers start avoiding him, but he helps them when they land in trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Naadodigal 2
programme.desc: Four friends fight casteism in society and help two lovers unite with each other against the will of their respective families.

programme.title: Movie - Venghai
programme.desc: A respectable village head decides to keep his son away from the violent politics of rural life. However, fate intervenes, forcing the young man to not only return home, but also take up the sickle.

programme.title: Movie - Innimey Ippadithaan
programme.desc: Seenu starts hunting for a girl after his astrologer advises him to get married within three months. He falls in love with Maha and wins her heart, but his parents get him engaged to Akhila.

programme.title: Movie - Pani Thuli
programme.desc: To prove his love for Archana, Shiva distances himself from her for a year due to a condition put forth to him by Archana's father. But during the year, he meets Maya and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Movie - Paruvathin Vasalile
programme.desc: Thyagu is fond of her elder sister's daughter Geetha, who meets Saravanan and helps him find a job in her company. However, Thyagu is shocked to learn about Geetha and Saravanan.

programme.title: Movie - King

programme.title: Movie - Thalapathy
programme.desc: Surya, a courageous man who gets raised in the slums, fights for the rights of the poor. However, he becomes friends with Deva, who hires him as his commander and changes his life completely.

programme.title: Movie - Vaale
programme.desc: Deva, a man with a hearing and speech impairment, secretly loves his twin brother's wife, Priya. He tries his best to separate the two, to the extent of following them on their honeymoon.

programme.title: Movie - Kasethan Kadavulada
programme.desc: Ramu schemes a devious plan when an affluent and dominating stepmother refuses him financial aid. Can he succeed in his plot to loot her high-security vault along with his cousin and friend?

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 5
programme.desc: Julia Stuart is joined by Ian Wright, Kolo Toure & Mikel John Obi to discuss the influence of African football on the Premier League.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 52
programme.desc: Set against one of the most dramatic seasons in recent memory, we explore the enduring intensity of the North London rivalry between Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur. We trace the origins of a feud shaped by geography, identity and decades of defining moments. We interweave the story of this season, which has reshaped the balance of power in North London and brings a fresh perspective to a rivalry already steeped in history.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 2
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 1
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League's fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe's elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining moments of his career, including spells with West Ham, Newcastle and Birmingham.

programme.title: REVIEW - SUN 14 SEP
programme.desc: After the international break, Review is back with highlights from Matchweek 4, starting with Arsenal facing Nottingham Forest, Everton hosting Villa, and the Manchester derby as United take on City at the Etihad.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, archive and a bespoke creative treatment, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 25
programme.desc: Ahead of the first North London derby of the season, we sit down with the man who made one of most controversial transfers in World football; Sol Campbell. He opens up about his decision to leave Tottenham for their fiercest rivals, Arsenal, the intense pressure of returning to White Hart Lane that first season, and how he's dealt with the fallout ever since. A fascinating insight into the 'move that shook North London'.

programme.desc: We head to London to unveil the two newest inductee's into the Premier League Hall of fame. Hosted by Kelly Cates, and with a who's who of footballing royalty in attendance, we go behind the curtain to give you exclusive access to the hottest ticket in town.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. From his journey from Class of '92 prodigy to Premier League Hall of Fame icon, he talks us through the moments that defined his legacy at Manchester United. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, we revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's unforgettable Tottenham Hotspur side; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers at home and in Europe. Playing fearless, high-intensity football and built around a young core of stars, Pochettino's Spurs came within touching distance of Premier League and Champions League glory, creating some of the club's greatest modern nights along the way.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, archive and a bespoke creative treatment, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 2
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, archive and a bespoke creative treatment, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage.

programme.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Arsenal (MW27) - EP 269
programme.desc: Spurs have lost their last three Premier League home games against Arsenal, as many as they had in their previous 23 (W10 D10). They last lost four in a row against them between 1952 and 1955.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Aston Villa (MW28) - EP 271
programme.desc: Wolves have won four of their last six Premier League home games against Aston Villa (D1 L1) and are unbeaten in four since a 1-0 loss in December 2020.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Newcastle United (MW27) - EP 261
programme.desc: Manchester City have won their last six Premier League home games against Newcastle without conceding. In their top-flight history, only against Stoke have they had a longer run of consecutive wins to nil (7 between 1982 and 2014).

programme.title: Leeds United vs Manchester City (MW28) - EP 276
programme.desc: Leeds have lost each of their last five Premier League games against Man City, having lost just four of their first 16 against them in the competition (W7 D5).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Chelsea (MW28) - EP 280
programme.desc: Arsenal have won their last three home league games against Chelsea, last winning more consecutively between 1990 and 1994 (5).

programme.title: Manchester City vs Nottingham Forest (MW29) - EP 288
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 16 of their last 19 Premier League home games (D2 L1), at least three more than any other side since April 2025.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Bournemouth (MW32) - EP 312
programme.desc: Having won each of their first eight home games against Bournemouth in all competitions, Arsenal lost this exact league fixture 2-1 last season.

programme.title: Chelsea vs Manchester City (MW32) - EP 319
programme.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last nine Premier League games against Man City (D3 L6) since a 2-1 away win in May 2021.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Newcastle United (MW34) - EP 339
programme.desc: Following their 2-1 win at St James’ Park in September, Arsenal are looking to complete the league double over Newcastle for the first time since 2020-21.

programme.title: Burnley vs Manchester City (MW34) - EP 333
programme.desc: Manchester City have won 14 of their last 15 Premier League games against Burnley (D1) since a 1-0 loss at Turf Moor in March 2015.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Arsenal (MW33) - EP 329
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: Wolverhampton Wanderers vs Arsenal (MW31) - EP 301
programme.desc: Since doing the double over Arsenal in 2020-21, Wolves have now lost each of their last nine against the Gunners in the Premier League.

programme.title: Everton vs Manchester City (MW35) - EP 350
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 11 league games (W8 D3), collecting more points (24) and conceding fewer goals (8) than any other side during that run.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Brentford (MW36) - EP 355
programme.desc: Though they’ve only failed to score in one of their nine Premier League games against Brentford, Man City’s average of 1.4 goals per game against the Bees (13 in 9) is their lowest against any opponent they’ve faced under Pep Guardiola.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal (MW36) - EP 359
programme.desc: West Ham are unbeaten in their last six home Premier League matches (W3 D3), last having a longer unbeaten run on home soil between September 2015 and April 2016 in their final season at Upton Park (15 games).

programme.title: Arsenal vs Burnley (MW37) - EP 368
programme.desc: Arsenal have only lost their final home league game in one of the last 28 seasons (W23 D4) and are unbeaten in 14 since a 2-1 loss to Aston Villa in 2010-11 (W12 D2).

programme.title: Bournemouth vs Manchester City (MW37) - EP 369
programme.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last 16 Premier League games (W8 D8), the longest run of any side in the competition this season. The Cherries have won four of their last five, as many as they had in their previous 22 combined (D12 L6).

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal (MW38) - EP 373
programme.desc: As a top-flight side, Crystal Palace have never lost when playing their final league match of the season at home (W8 D4), most recently beating Aston Villa 5-0 in 2023-24.

programme.title: FS MMA Jake Shields vs. Ray Steinbeiss
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! In sunny Costa Rica, Jake Shields takes on Ray "Ipswich Cobra" Steinbeiss in a technical chess match that spells victory for only one man.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Shane Mosley
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is then-unbeaten Saul "Canelo" Alvarez in what might yet be his toughest challenge in his career, as he defends the WBC light middleweight championship against "Sugar" Shane Mosley. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 2 from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan features Asanoyama, Takakeisho, Kiribayama and Mitakeumi.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Women's Weapons Championship at the ISKA US Open Championships held at Disney World, Orlando, FL, USA.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Marcos Maidana vs. Erik Morales
programme.desc: This episode features Marcos Maidana attempting to win the WBA interim super lightweight title against Erik Morales, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: WCCB Sara Bailey vs. Evelin Bermudez
programme.desc: LIVE September 21st from the Hard Rock Casino in Ottawa, Canada, undefeated WBA Light Flyweight World Champion Sara Bailey of Ontario and IBF/WBO Light Flyweight World Champion Evelin Bermudez of Argentina meet to unify the titles. Bailey claimed her title in just her fourth professional fight defeating Guadalupe Bautista, and Bermudez became a two-time champion when beating Tania Enriquez before two successful defenses.

programme.title: WCK
programme.desc: From Tokyo, Japan, K-1 Kickboxing returns headlined by two championship bouts, as well as the 'World's Strongest Tournament' in the -70kg division. With the K-1 Heavyweight Championship on the line, 27-3 Roel Mannaart of The Netherlands defends against Ariel Machado of Brazil, a veteran of 75 professional bouts. For the K-1 Cruiserweight Title, undefeated Luc Verheije of The Netherlands, with a spectacular record of 32-0 with 29 knockouts, takes on 12-1 Tangshan Wen of China.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Yannick Bahati vs. Dricus du Plessis
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of mixed martial arts headlined by a dramatic middleweight title fight between Yannick Bahati and Dricus du Plessis that ends in a tapout by guillotine, while Ricky Misholas takes on Nico Yamdjie in a heavyweight battle.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Paul Williams vs. Verno Phillips
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features Junior Middleweights Paul "The Punisher" Williams (35-1, 26 KOs) and Verno Phillips (42-10, 21 KOs) as they battle for the vacant WBO Interim Belt at the Citizens Business Bank Arena in Ontario, California, USA, on November 29, 2008.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Marco Antonio Barrera vs. Agapito Sanchez
programme.desc: With the WBO Super Bantamweight World Championship on the line, titleholder Marco Antonio Barrera of Mexico takes on Dominican challenger Agapito Sanchez in front of a hot crowd at the Civic Center in South Padre Island, Texas. This would be the third defense for Barrera, who claimed the title with a decision victory over Daniel Jimenez earlier in the year. Sanchez was a worthy contender to the title, giving the 37-0 champion a much tougher challenge than he expected.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Chad Dawson
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Bernard Hopkins facing off with Chad Dawson in a light heavyweight championship rematch from their controversial October 2011 bout. Also on the card, action from former welterweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: American Ninja Warrior travels back to San Jose, California where the top 30 competitors from the Military Qualifier tackle the Military Finals course. In addition to the obstacles from the Military Qualifier, contestants will face Salmon Ladder, Arm Rings, Doorknob Arch and Spider Climb. Top competitors Army National Guard Caption Ryan Stratis, active Navy Lieutenant Junior Grade Dustin McKinney and Coast Guard Aviation Survival Technician Robin Pietschmann will take on the course.
